full_text:
Budugen 步度根
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Budugen (步度根). A Lord of the Xianbei. Allied with Wei, then allied and got killed by Kebineng. Budugen was affiliated with Xianbei. Budugen lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
